description: `tan 90` is mathematically undefined (cosine is 0 there) and raises `ol-div-zero` reusing the division-by-zero code family (issue #323: spec/commands.md names no dedicated code for trig's undefined case, and spec/commands.md's Math intro plus `tan θ = sin θ / cos θ` justify the reuse) instead of returning a huge finite double, NaN, or Infinity. Execution halts at the failing statement, so no `print` event is emitted.
